## Courses & Events

Do I need to become a member to attend a course. Yes. But you automatically become a member once you register for a course so it couldn’t be simpler.

For 2021 these included MIPCOM and CMC. How does the subsidy work. The specific level of subsidy is allocated on a course-by-course basis, according to course type, number of trainees, accreditation and location required. By combining purchasing power with the grant funding available to us through Skillnet Ireland, we can provide high quality subsidised training at a considerable discount to the normal market price. The course cost listed on our site is always the rate with the subsidy applied.

The objective of this national network is to support the growth of Ireland’s Film, TV and Post-Production sectors through the provision of subsidized training. The network is led by a steering group which includes member companies and industry associations. We offer: Bespoke training courses devised and designed in consultation with the steering group and the industry as a whole. Subsidized In-house training for companies Networking events Reduced rate delegate passes.

All future courses, events and activities will be delivered through this new network. Find out more about Cultural & Creative Industries Skillnet Please explore the FAQ’s below to learn more about our Network. If your query is not answered, please contact screenskillnet@gmail. com and we’ll be happy to help you. What is Screen Skillnet. Screen Skillnet is a learning organization funded through the Department of Further and Higher Education.

She is passionate about coaching creatives how to thrive rather than survive in the freelance world of work.

Tutor Profile: Kate O’Dwyer is a freelance casting producer, mindset coach for creatives and entrepreneur. She has worked as a freelancer in the Irish TV industry for the past 10 years.

Maintaining a realistic and manageable work-life balance Participant Profile: This course is aimed at screen industry professionals looking to build a sustainable and enjoyable freelance career. The course is limited to 12 participants. Application Procedure: Please apply online at www. screenskillsireland. ie by 12pm on Thursday May 6th. For further information, please email barbara. deignan@screenskillnet. ie For technical difficulties with the online system please email elizabeth.

This workshop is perfect for you if you find yourself thinking. -‘I’m a freelancer, get me out of here” more often than you’d like. Course content What is mindset. Getting to grips with the mindset of the most successful freelancers Bust some freelancing myths that keep us exhausted, overworking and undercharging.

In this practical workshop, you will learn how to master your mindset to set yourself up to build a sustainable and enjoyable freelance career. You will complete this workshop having built a successful and strong freelancer mindset, with fresh insights into how your thinking can have a huge impact on your health and career. This workshop is perfect if you’re a freelancer who knows that a fresh way of thinking could support your sustainable success.

30pm Tutor(s): Kate O’Dwyer Duration: 90mins Venue: Online Cost: €25 Course Profile: This course is presented in partnership with Screen Skillnet. Success in freelancing means a lot more than simply being great at the work you do; equally important to your career is adopting the right mindset. Learn how to master your mindset as a freelancer in this practical, hands-on workshop with Kate O’Dwyer, Mindset and Visibility Coach and guest booker on The Tommy Tiernan Show.

# 12. 05. 21 Master Your Mindset as a Freelancer
